feed.title: [BIP Draft] Segregated Data: a prunable, script-isolated block region for data carriage

entry.title: [BIP Draft] Segregated Data: a prunable, script-isolated block region for data carriage
entry.summary: The email highlights specific properties of SegData in relation to its functionality within transaction systems. Firstly, it is emphasized that SegData entries are script-isolated, ensuring that they do not permit any spending transactions. This characteristic effectively enhances the security and integrity of the data handled. Secondly, these entries are positioned outside the traditional transaction structure, which allows for the data to be distinctly identifiable. This placement facilitates easier management and selective retention of data. The combination of these two features fundamentally enables SegData to segregate and manage data efficiently, setting a clear distinction from other data handling methods within transactional frameworks.
